O

onBindViewHolder(EntrantAdapter.EntrantViewHolder, int) - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.EntrantAdapter
Binds entrant data to the row at the given position.
onBindViewHolder(EventAdapter.EventViewHolder, int) - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.EventAdapter
Binds event data and click listeners to the row at the given position.
onCreate(Bundle) - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.EntrantListActivity
Initializes the activity, validates intent extras, sets up the toolbar, and loads waitlist entrants.
onCreate(Bundle) - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.ManageEventActivity
Initializes the activity, validates intent extras, sets up the toolbar, and loads event data.
onCreate(Bundle) - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.OrganizerDashboardActivity
Initializes the dashboard and loads organizer events.
onCreate(Bundle) - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.WaitlistMapActivity
Initializes the activity, validates extras, and requests the map asynchronously.
onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.EntrantAdapter
Inflates a single entrant item view.
onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.EventAdapter
Inflates a single organizer event item view.
onEntrantsClick(Event) - 接口中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.OnEventClickListener
Called when the organizer wants to view entrants of the selected event.
OnEventClickListener - com.example.eventparticipation中的接口
Listener interface for organizer event card actions.
onLotteryClick(Event) - 接口中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.OnEventClickListener
Called when the organizer chooses to run the lottery for the selected event.
onManageClick(Event) - 接口中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.OnEventClickListener
Called when the organizer chooses to manage the selected event.
onMapReady(GoogleMap) - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.WaitlistMapActivity
Called when the map is ready for use.
onQRCodeClick(Event) - 接口中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.OnEventClickListener
Called when the organizer wants to display the QR code for the selected event.
onSupportNavigateUp() - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.EntrantListActivity
Handles the toolbar up button.
onSupportNavigateUp() - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.ManageEventActivity
 
onSupportNavigateUp() - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.WaitlistMapActivity
Handles the toolbar up button.
onViewClick(Event) - 接口中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.OnEventClickListener
Called when the organizer wants to open the event detail view.
OrganizerDashboardActivity - com.example.eventparticipation中的类
Organizer dashboard screen that displays summary statistics and event cards.
